headline: Nicholas Sergio Begins Second Year Serving on Raymond James Leadership Advisory Board
summary: Banyan Wealth | Raymond James is proud to announce that founder and wealth advisor Nicholas Sergio, AIF®, CPFA®, has begun his second year serving on the Raymond James Independent Contractor Division Leadership Advisory Board (LAB).

raw.headline: Nicholas Sergio Begins Second Year Serving on Raymond James Leadership Advisory Board
raw.summary: Banyan Wealth | Raymond James is proud to announce that founder and wealth advisor Nicholas Sergio, AIF®, CPFA®, has begun his second year serving on the Raymond James Independent Contractor Division Leadership Advisory Board (LAB).

headline: How The Amerant Bancorp (AMTB) Story Is Shifting With New Leadership And Fair Value Assumptions
summary: Amerant Bancorp's updated fair value estimate has shifted slightly higher, from US$25.50 to US$25.75 per share, keeping attention on how closely the stock lines up with analyst price targets in the mid US$20s. Analysts linking this change to recent commentary highlight management's plan to restore profitability after the Q1 setback and the ongoing effort to balance growth with competition in Florida. As you read on, you will see how these views fit together and what to watch as the story...
